fields.label: Secure Boot certificate status

column.name: SecureBootCertStatus
column.description: Secure Boot 2023 certificate update status (JSON): Secure Boot enabled, UEFI CA 2023 servicing status, AvailableUpdates(Policy), 2023 cert/KEK presence in UEFI db/KEK, Secure-Boot-Update task state, and a System event-log summary. See https://aka.ms/securebootplaybook.
